Ffmpeg.//: Empty/absent => the bundled binary next to the executable (ffmpeg.exe on Windows, ffmpeg on macOS).

Dvr.//: Pause/rewind for live streams: the companion records a rolling on-disk HLS window.
Dvr.//recordings: Persistent recordings (DVR). RecordingsDir empty => the platform default (Windows: user's Videos folder, else %ProgramData%\PlaylistMixer Companion\Recordings; macOS: ~/Movies/PlaylistMixer Recordings). Always absolute; NEVER %TEMP%.
